tasks.subject: Task 1: Database & Type Foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `claude_session_id` column and `"archived"` system tag.

**Files:** packages/db/src/schema.ts, packages/core/src/pipeline/types.ts, packages/db/src/queries.ts, apps/desktop/src/stores/db.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/db/src/schema.ts", "packages/core/src/pipeline/types.ts", "packages/db/src/queries.ts", "apps/desktop/src/stores/db.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd packages/db && bun tsc --noEmit && cd ../core && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PipelineItem has claude_session_id", "SYSTEM_TAGS includes archived", "addPipelineItemTag handles archived closed_at", "removePipelineItemTag handles archived closed_at", "migration adds column", "updateClaudeSessionId exported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add SIGINT to Daemon Signal Handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Allow frontend to send SIGINT for graceful Claude shutdown.

**Files:** crates/daemon/src/main.rs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/daemon/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd crates/daemon && cargo clippy && cargo test -- --test-threads=1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SIGINT accepted in Signal command", "existing signals unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Pass --session-id on Spawn and Store in DB
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate UUID on spawn, pass --session-id, store in DB.

**Files:** apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["UUID generated and stored on spawn", "--session-id flag passed", "resumeSessionId option", "--resume used when resuming"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Convert closeTask() to Archive and Update undoClose()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** closeTask sends SIGINT + tags archived. undoClose resumes with --resume.

**Files:** apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SIGINT instead of kill", "archived tag on close", "undoClose queries archived", "undoClose passes resumeSessionId", "checkUnblocked not called"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Sidebar and Store Filtering — Hide Archived Tasks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Archived tasks hidden from sidebar and store lists.

**Files:** packages/core/src/pipeline/types.ts, apps/desktop/src/components/Sidebar.vue, apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/core/src/pipeline/types.ts", "apps/desktop/src/components/Sidebar.vue", "apps/desktop/src/stores/kanna.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isHidden helper exported", "Sidebar filters exclude archived", "sortItemsForRepo excludes archived", "currentItem skips archived"]}
```
